base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of items_atlas — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1988 super mario bros 2. Item roster — Vegetable (pull-and-throw), Magic Potion (Subspace-door), Cherry (5=Starman), Mushroom (1-health), POW Block, Key, Shell (koopa-slide), Bombs, Heart (refill), 1UP, Stopwatch. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Item roster — Vegetable (pull-and-throw), Magic Potion (Subspace-door), Cherry (5=Starman), Mushroom (1-health), POW Block, Key, Shell (koopa-slide), Bombs, Heart (refill), 1UP, Stopwatch
